name: Crown Zenith Elite Trainer Box
description: Sealed Crown Zenith ETB with 10 booster packs, 65 card sleeves, dice, and the Galarian Gallery insert. Stored in a smoke-free, climate-controlled environment.

name: Scarlet & Violet 151 Booster Box
description: 36-pack sealed booster box of the wildly popular 151 set. Case-fresh, never searched or weighed.

name: Hidden Fates Elite Trainer Box
description: Highly sought-after Hidden Fates ETB. A modern grail for sealed collectors. Sealed and authenticated.

name: Evolving Skies Booster Box
description: The Alt-Art king. Sealed Evolving Skies booster box — home of the chase Umbreon VMAX. Investment-grade sealed product.

name: Charizard — Base Set — PSA 9
description: The holy grail. 1999 Base Set Holo Charizard graded PSA 9 Mint. Sharp corners, clean holo, dead-centered. Fresh from a trusted PSA submission.

name: Umbreon Gold Star — CGC 8.5
description: Ultra-rare POP Series 5 Umbreon Gold Star, graded CGC 8.5. One of the most iconic Eeveelution chase cards ever printed.

name: Pikachu Illustrator — PSA 7
description: The most famous Pokémon card in existence. 1998 Pikachu Illustrator promo, PSA 7. Full authentication paperwork and provenance provided. Serious inquiries only.

name: Lugia — Neo Genesis — PSA 8
description: First-edition Neo Genesis Holo Lugia in a PSA 8 slab. A cornerstone vintage holo for any serious collection.

name: Blastoise — Base Set — PSA 9
description: 1999 Base Set Holo Blastoise, PSA 9 Mint. Beautiful holo bleed and razor-sharp centering.
